_doc: APP-LOCAL activation gate for the residual closure-GNN edit path (api/recompute.py). This is the verdict the live dispatch reads. It is INTENTIONALLY ship=false: we have NOT validated that the residual GNN's closure predictions transfer to the APP's open-road sim baseline (the sim_open channels), and a newer stage2_enriched checkpoint is still training. While ship=false the closure edit path is byte-identical to the existing sim path. To activate: drop a validated checkpoint at TS_RESIDUAL_CKPT and flip closures.ship to true (see models/gnn/stage2_gate_verdict.json for the training-side gate metrics, which are NOT trusted by this app-local gate until app-baseline transfer is validated).

closures.reason: transfer to app open-road baseline not validated; stage2_enriched still training
